revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-235

Reciprocal of the period.

Symbol f, ?

Note: 1 When the independent variable is time, the unit of frequency is the hertz.

Unit hertz (Hz) lHz = l/s


Reference: C.I.E.


Note: 2 In Britain, France and U.S.A. cycles per second (cps or c/s) have been used for "hertz".


{{IALAFooter}}
